title: Alignment
pickOne: **Good** - Use trickery to help people when the law cannot.
**Chaotic** - Expose corruption or hypocrisy with your tricks.
**Evil** - Con people out of their valuables.

title: Race
pickOne: **Human** - Once per session, when you Defy Danger with CHA, you may roll twice and keep the better result.
**Halfling** - When someone underestimates you because of your size, take +1 to act against them.

title: Silvertongue (+CHA)
description: When you **persuade someone to believe a partial truth or a half-truth**, roll+CHA.

outcomes.text: They'll believe you until they see or hear something that convinces them otherwise.
They'll be fooled, but not for very long.

submoves.title: Note
submoves.description: This move will not work on anyone who is outwardly hostile to you or suspicious of you. Other players are always suspicious of you, since they know you're the Trickster.

title: Social Engineering (+CHA)
description: When you **spend some time scouting a local community for easy marks and opportunities**, roll+CHA.

submoves.title: Spend Favor
submoves.description: You may spend hold to call in a favor; you can ask someone to do a simple, non-dangerous task for you, and they'll do it. The GM may spend his hold at any time to introduce a person hostile to you, suspicious of you, or whom you owe big time. You cannot extract favors from anyone who is outwardly hostile to you or suspicious of you. Other players are always suspicious of you, since they know you're the Trickster.

title: Dirty Tricks
description: When you **Aid Another** using misdirection or distraction, take +1. When another person stands in **Defense** of you, they take +1.

title: Confounding Blade (+DEX)
description: When you **Hack & Slash**, you may choose to deal no damage and instead roll+DEX.

bullets: Your target drops something they are holding
Your target is confused and attacks an ally on their next action
You may immediately move without triggering a response

title: Deep Pockets
description: You always seem to have just the right thing on hand. Once per session, you may produce a mundane item of 0 weight from your person — something plausible but unspecified until now.

title: Disguise
description: Given a few minutes and the right materials, you can disguise yourself as a member of any race or gender, or as a specific person you have observed for at least a few minutes. The disguise holds until someone has strong reason to look closely, or until you take damage.

title: New Tricks
description: Choose one move from the Thief's advanced moves.

title: Smoke Bomb
description: You carry smoke bombs. When you **throw a smoke bomb**, everyone in the area must immediately **Defy Danger** or lose track of you. You may move freely through the smoke without penalty.

title: Legerdemain (+DEX)
description: When you **pick pockets or perform sleight of hand**, roll+DEX.

outcomes.text: You do it, clean and unnoticed.
You do it, but the GM chooses one:
bullets: You are noticed in the act

title: Lamentable Belaborment (+CHA)
description: When you **distract and bewilder someone with words**, roll+CHA.

outcomes.text: They are completely distracted until something snaps them out of it or you stop talking.
They are distracted for a moment — long enough for one action.

title: Escape Artist
description: When you **attempt to escape from bonds, a grapple, or confinement**, you always succeed. The only question is how long it takes and whether you are noticed.

title: Rumormonger (+CHA)
description: When you **spread a rumor through a community**, roll+CHA.

outcomes.text: The rumor spreads quickly and is widely believed. The GM will tell you one unintended consequence.
The rumor spreads, but is only partially believed or takes longer to take root.

title: Pyrotechnics (Requires level 6+)
description:
Requires: **Smoke Bomb**

When you create a smoke bomb, you may instead create an incendiary smoke bomb, which also deals your damage to anyone caught in the effect and may start fires when thrown.

title: Smokescreen (Requires level 6+)
description:
Requires: **Smoke Bomb**

When you attack someone caught in your smoke bomb, deal your damage+1d6.

title: Instigator (Requires level 6+)
description:
Requires: **Lamentable Belaborment**

When you use **Lamentable Belaborment**, on a 10+ the argument also gets a little violent; deal your damage to any two affected targets.

title: Entangling Blade (Requires level 6+)
description:
Replaces: **Confounding Blade**

When you **Hack & Slash**, on a hit you create an advantage against your foe; either you or an ally acting on it takes **+1 forward** and deals +1d4 damage against that foe.

title: All According to the Plan… (Requires level 6+)
description: You can foresee when you will need help the most, and plan accordingly. You may spend hold from **Social Engineering** to have a fortunate but plausible coincidence befall you.

title: Cheat Death (Requires level 6+)
description: When you take your **Last Breath**, Death will always offer you a bargain, even on a 6-. If you don't keep your end of it, you'll still live, but Death will claim your soul the next time you are reduced to 0 HP.

title: Blind Lie (Requires level 6+)
description: When you **tell a lie to someone**, roll+CHA.

outcomes.text: They will literally not be able to see any evidence that what you said is a lie; it will just vanish from their sight.
They'll still believe you, but only for a few moments. If you take any action that would contradict your lie, the effect ends.
